description:
You are a flight dynamics engineer for the DSCOVR space weather observatory at the Sun-Earth L1 Lagrange point. Using the baseline script at ~/Documents/missions/dscovr_baseline.script, design an X-axis stationkeeping maneuver (SKM) to target a half-halo orbit plane crossing. The SKM_Burn must use the SunEarthRot coordinate system. Use a Differential Corrector (DC1) to vary the X-component (Element1) of the burn to achieve zero X-velocity (DSCOVR.SunEarthRot.VX = 0, tolerance 1e-6) at the next X-Z plane crossing (DSCOVR.SunEarthRot.Y = 0) after an initial 5-day propagation. Save the converged script to ~/GMAT_output/dscovr_skm.script and write a summary to ~/GMAT_output/l1_skm_report.txt containing the delta_v_x_m_s and time_to_crossing_days (total elapsed days from maneuver to crossing).

Login: username=ga, password=password123
